extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter won bunch sprint after INEOS unexpectedly contested intermediate sprint at 12km, gaining THOMAS Geraint time bonuses that reshuffled GC.
tactical_patterns: INEOS contested second intermediate sprint with ROWE leadout at 12km, THOMAS taking 3sec bonuses despite no GC threat.
BISEGGER Stefan double-attacked from break with 35km then on penultimate climb, forcing BIKE EXCHANGE to chase alone.
Late crashes after 3km-to-go safe zone reshuffled GC, catching SCHACHMANN and POZZOVIVO who lost top-10 positions.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: INEOS committed leadout resources for intermediate sprint bonuses despite no obvious GC ambitions, signals form improving
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Mark: negative: briefly moved second overall via sprint bonus but caught in late crash after 3km mark, dropped from top-10
rider_signals.BISEGGER Stefan: positive: attacked twice from break including solo effort extending gap to 59sec on penultimate climb before recapture
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: first WorldTour win in 9 months after team rode all day, suggests sustained power returning weeks before Tour
